title: hyoscyamus albus proles major
intro: Hyoscyamus albus proles major, also known as greater henbane, is a flowering plant in the nightshade family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, analgesic, and anticholinergic effects. The health benefits of Hyoscyamus albus proles major include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms, as well as pain management. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
